context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies a loop-detection safeguard scenario (two consecutive rounds with the same finding signature) and produces a handover message with the correct format and options. The loop state shows the signature matches across rounds, planIterationsThisVersion is 3, and blocking.total is 2. The agent must NOT attempt further auto-iteration or call any acceptance method.

checklist.name: Loop detected identified
checklist.description: handover.md identifies this as a loop-detected situation — mentions that two consecutive rounds produced the same findings or the same signature, NOT that an iteration cap was reached

checklist.name: Repeated findings listed
checklist.description: handover.md lists both repeated HIGH findings from the state: the EventBus/DomainEventPublisher architecture finding (review-adversarial) and the NotificationService.sendBatch() confabulation finding (review-code)

checklist.name: No approve_plan call
checklist.description: handover.md does NOT include or suggest calling approve_plan, and does NOT indicate the plan should be approved in the current state

checklist.name: No further auto-iteration
checklist.description: handover.md does NOT include or suggest another autonomous reject_plan + plan iteration — it presents the situation for human judgment instead

checklist.name: Asks for direction not approval
checklist.description: handover.md asks the human for direction or a decision on how to proceed (e.g. 'What's the right call?', 'How would you like to proceed?') — NOT asking for approval of the current plan

checklist.name: Pivot option included
checklist.description: handover.md offers pivoting the approach (changing strategy, trying a different direction) as one of the options

checklist.name: Wontfix option included
checklist.description: handover.md offers marking the repeated findings as wontfix (with justification) as one of the options

checklist.name: Accept-incomplete option included
checklist.description: handover.md offers accepting the incomplete result (proceeding despite unresolved findings) as one of the options — with a note that findings must be explicitly marked as accepted

checklist.name: Loop stuck explanation
checklist.description: handover.md explains WHY the loop is stuck — that the same findings keep appearing despite revisions, indicating the current approach cannot resolve them

checklist.name: Review history referenced
checklist.description: handover.md includes or references the iteration history (e.g. mentions that 3 iterations have been run, or shows that the findings appeared in consecutive rounds)
